task_name: health-query live debugging and skill enforcement

continuity.arc_goal: Build unified Health SQLite database (health.db) with cross-pillar queries + complete read layer (health_query.py, cost_summary.py, health-query SKILL.md) so agent can answer 'how has my ApoB changed and what does Attia say about it' meaningfully via iMessage/BlueBubbles, with weekly email summaries and spend tracking.

progress_update.summary: We debugged and fixed the health-query skill end-to-end. Resolved three routing failures: (1) agent used memory_search instead of exec — fixed by adding AGENTS.md Rule 6b with explicit forbidden phrases and exact exec paths; (2) agent answered from training data without calling any tool — fixed by adding per-intent 'YOU DO NOT KNOW THIS DATA' guards to SKILL.md; (3) 'what do my podcast summaries say about X' routed to podcast-summary Whisper transcription instead of health-query FTS5 search — fixed by adding IMPORTANT DISTINCTION comment to Rule 6a and expanding Intent 3 triggers. All fixes confirmed working via live iMessage tests. Also captured 3 new SPECTRE skills: gotchas-compose-up-cooldown, procedures-health-pillar-onboarding, and the compose-up cooldown gotcha.
progress_update.goal: Health intelligence read layer fully operational via iMessage — lab queries, Oura queries, podcast knowledge search, and web fallback all routing and executing correctly.
accomplished: Fixed AGENTS.md Rule 6b: explicit forbidden responses + exact exec paths for lab and Oura queries — model now calls exec instead of answering from training data
Fixed health-query SKILL.md: added per-intent 'YOU DO NOT KNOW THIS DATA, DO NOT ANSWER WITHOUT EXEC' guards for Intent 1 (lab) and Intent 2 (Oura)
Fixed skill config sync: health-query was missing from config-runtime/openclaw.json after compose-up cooldown — added it and restarted
Fixed routing: 'what do my podcast summaries say about X' now routes to health-query Intent 3 (FTS5 search) not podcast-summary (Whisper transcription)
Confirmed live: A1c query returns actual DB values; podcast knowledge search correctly reports thin coverage and offers web fallback
Saved 3 new SPECTRE skills: gotchas-compose-up-cooldown, procedures-health-pillar-onboarding, patterns-sqlite-fts5-python v2
All changes committed and pushed to origin/main (commits 9152cb3, 0148889, 50a0b9f)
progress_update.now: Session complete. Health-query skill fully operational. All routing issues resolved and confirmed via live iMessage.
next_steps: Bulk ingest Attia/Huberman/Rhonda episodes to populate health knowledge index (currently ~12 episodes — thin for A1c/metabolic queries)
Next data pillar: blood pressure, DEXA, macros, or workouts — follow procedures-health-pillar-onboarding skill checklist
Consider DB migration runner (PRAGMA user_version) before adding more pillars
Architecture review from /spectre:evaluate (Session 6) may have completed — check docs/tasks/main/reviews/
constraints: AGENTS.md Rule 6b must be updated whenever a new health data type is added — model will not exec without explicit forbidden phrases
compose-up.sh cooldown skips restart — always run 'docker restart sample-agent_secure' after config changes if cooldown fires
SKILL.md alone insufficient for personal data queries with GPT-5-mini — AGENTS.md rule with forbidden phrases is required
health knowledge index is thin (~12 episodes) — FTS5 search will fall back to Perplexity for most health topics until bulk ingestion
health_query.py runs inside agent container — paths must be container-relative (/home/openclaw/.openclaw/workspace/health/)
Python 3 only, no new pip deps beyond stdlib + sqlite3
health.db at workspace/health/health.db — imported via sys.path.insert
Perplexity already configured in openclaw.json, now enabled: true
Weekly summary email via send-email.sh (SMTP_FROM_EMAIL + GMAIL_APP_PASSWORD in .env)
BlueBubbles is sole active channel — Telegram disabled (config preserved)
All planning docs in ~/Code Projects/Health DB/ — NOT in ironclaw repo docs/tasks/
decisions: Podcast knowledge search ('what do my summaries say about X') routes to health-query FTS5, not podcast-summary Whisper — different pipelines for searching existing vs transcribing new
Rule 6b pattern confirmed: forbidden response phrases + exact exec commands in AGENTS.md is the reliable enforcement layer for GPT-5-mini personal data queries
Routing logic in SKILL.md not health_query.py — agent has conversational context for follow-up contrast flow
Email body via temp file write (/tmp/health_weekly.txt), not stdin piping — exec tool may not support stdin
FTS5 user input phrase-quoted (_fts_quote) to prevent operator injection; LIKE wildcards escaped with ESCAPE clause
Weekly summary cron task wording matches Intent 5 triggers exactly so cron re-entry routes correctly
health_store.py public API (append_entry, load_all, find_by_show) must be preserved — engine.py and on_demand.py cannot change
launchd oura sync uses StartCalendarInterval (batch/weekly) not KeepAlive (daemon) — different from whisper-server pattern
Blood lab import runs --dry-run first to handle unknown Excel layout quirks before committing
Jeff has Gen3 Oura ring — pull all endpoints including stress, resilience, VO2 max; handle 404s gracefully
Oura heartrate 'missing' data is an API limitation — not fixable, accepted as-is
daily_spo2 is the correct Oura v2 endpoint (not spo2); daily_hrv endpoint doesn't exist (HRV via sleep sessions avg_hrv)
All planning docs now live in ~/Code Projects/{Project Name}/ — not inside the ironclaw repo
risks: AGENTS.md is already large (~48K chars system prompt) and gets ~17% truncated — Rule 6b entries must stay concise as more data pillars are added
Thin knowledge index means most health knowledge queries fall back to web — not wrong, but less useful than intended until bulk ingestion
cost_summary.py mtime-based filtering is an approximation — sessions that span midnight may be miscounted

context.session_arc: 7-session sprint on health-db + health_query (Apr 26-27). S1 scoped health-db. S2 implemented phases 1-3 (SQLite, blood labs, Oura). S3 wrote tests + /spectre:clean. S4 clean/test/evaluate, fixed 3 architecture issues, pushed, disabled Telegram. S5 scoped health_query.py (3 subcommands, 6 intents), shipped raw_transcript storage. S6 executed health_query.py: built all 3 subcommands, cost_summary.py, health-query SKILL.md, enabled Perplexity, 88 tests passing, pushed 5 commits. S7 debugged live routing: fixed AGENTS.md Rule 6b enforcement, per-intent guardrails in SKILL.md, skill config sync issue, and intent triggers. All routing confirmed working via iMessage. Architecture is solid; next step is bulk knowledge ingestion.
